name: Bullet of Armor
short_description: Welcome to Bullet of Armor! Bullet of Armor is a shooter game with a 2d that you can play offline. It is a shooter game where you can compete against your enemies on game maps. You can earn more points by making headshots, and you can earn more points by killing more enemies.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Bullet of Armor!

Bullet of Armor is a shooter game with a 2d that you can play offline. It is a shooter game where you can compete against your enemies on game maps. You can earn more points by making headshots, and you can earn more points by killing more enemies.

You can score points by shooting people in the head and body without the bullet hitting any obstacles. Headshots will earn you more points. The more the bullet hits obstacles, the more its durability decreases, and eventually, it will lose its momentum and fall to the ground, ending the game.
